data.acceptance:
1. Codex item/agentMessage/delta events with params.delta render visible assistant text in the terminal Detail stream and history console.
2. Codex item/agentMessage/delta events with params.text render the same visible assistant text as params.delta.
3. Codex item/commandExecution/outputDelta events with params.delta render visible command output in the terminal Detail stream and history console.
4. Codex item/commandExecution/outputDelta events with params.text render the same visible command output as params.delta.
5. Empty Codex reasoning completions do not produce user-visible (no text) content_block_delta spam.
6. The fix includes automated regression tests and passes lint, typecheck, tests, and build.
